title: Hedgewitch
description: You have angered The Lich King, who sends his most powerful dead after you. Use your magical knowledge to overcome these threats and strike back at the Lich.
body:
Hedgewitch is a magic focused high difficulty modpack where you are a witch who has angered the Lich King, and now you're pursued by powerful undead. Invoke occult powers to overcome the threats posed by these undead with the rituals of **Bewitchment** or the thought-empowered spells of **Hex Casting**. Explore a world reshaped by **Tectonic** and **Spelunkery**, make delicious food with **Farmer's Delight**, and beware **Eldritch Mobs** and the empowered dead of **Consecration**.

This pack was released as part of the Seasons SMP, where each season of the year we move to a new custom modpack. This was the Summer pack of 2024.
